cli.inference.text_generate:model_id: [常规选项] 模型ID | (type: string) | 必填
cli.inference.text_generate:device: [常规选项] 设备 | (type: string) | 默认值: TEST_DEVICE
cli.inference.text_generate:num_devices: [常规选项] 设备数量 | (type: integer) | 默认值: 1
cli.inference.text_generate:reserved_mem: [常规选项] 预留内存（GB）| (type: float (0.0–1.0)) | 默认值: 0.0
cli.inference.text_generate:log_level: [常规选项] 日志级别 | (type: string) | 默认值: error
cli.inference.text_generate:num_queries: [LLM选项] 查询数量 | (type: integer) | 必填
cli.inference.text_generate:query_length: [LLM选项] 查询长度 | (type: integer) | 必填
cli.inference.text_generate:context_leng: [LLM选项] 上下文长度 | (type: integer) | 默认值: 0
cli.inference.text_generate:decode: [LLM选项] 解码 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:prefix_cache: [LLM选项] 前缀缓存命中率 | (type: float (0.0–1.0)) | 默认值: 0.0
cli.inference.text_generate:num_mtp_toke: [LLM选项] Mtp令牌数量 | (type: integer) | 默认值: 0
cli.inference.text_generate:disable_repe: [LLM选项] 禁用重复 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:compile: [优化选项] 编译 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:compile_allo: [优化选项] 允许图中断的编译 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:quantize_lin: [量化选项] 量化线性操作 | (type: string (单选)) | 选项：DISABLED, W8A16_STATIC, W8A8_STATIC, W4A8_STATIC, W8A16_DYNAMIC…
cli.inference.text_generate:quantize_lmh: [量化选项] 量化语言模型头 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:mxfp4_group_: [量化选项] Mxfp4 组大小 | (type: integer) | 默认值：32
cli.inference.text_generate:quantize_att: [量化选项] 量化注意力操作 | (type: string (单选)) | 选项：DISABLED, INT8, FP8
cli.inference.text_generate:graph_log_ur: [调试选项] 图日志 URL | (type: string)
cli.inference.text_generate:dump_input_s: [调试选项] 转储输入形状 | (type: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.text_generate:chrome_trace: [调试选项] Chrome 追踪 | (type: string)
cli.inference.text_generate:num_hidden_l: [调试选项] 隐藏层数量覆盖 | (type: integer) | 默认值：0
cli.inference.text_generate:tp_size: [并行选项] 张量并行大小 | (type: integer) | 默认值：1
cli.inference.text_generate:dp_size: [并行选项] 数据并行大小 | (type: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:ep_size: [并行选项] Ep Size | (类型: integer) | 默认: 1
cli.inference.text_generate:o_proj_tp_si: [并行选项] O Proj Tp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:o_proj_dp_si: [并行选项] O Proj Dp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:mlp_tp_size: [并行选项] Mlp Tp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:mlp_dp_size: [并行选项] Mlp Dp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:lmhead_tp_si: [并行选项] Lmhead Tp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:lmhead_dp_si: [并行选项] Lmhead Dp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:moe_tp_size: [并行选项] Moe Tp Size | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:moe_dp_size: [并行选项] Moe Dp Size | (类型: integer) | 默认: 1
cli.inference.text_generate:word_embeddi: [并行选项] Word Embedding Tp | (类型: string (选项之一)) | 选项: col, row
cli.inference.text_generate:enable_redun: [并行选项] Enable Redundant Experts | (类型: string) | boolean flag
cli.inference.text_generate:enable_exter: [并行选项] Enable External Shared Experts | (类型: string) | boolean flag
cli.inference.text_generate:host_externa: [并行选项] 主机外部共享专家 | (type: string) | boolean flag
cli.inference.text_generate:image_batch_: [多模态选项] 图像批量大小 | (type: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:image_height: [多模态选项] 图像高度 | (type: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:image_width: [多模态选项] 图像宽度 | (type: integer)
cli.inference.text_generate:remote_sourc: [通用] 远程来源 | (type: string (one of options)) | default: huggingface | options: huggingface, modelscope
cli.inference.text_generate:profiling_da: [通用] 性能分析数据库 | (type: string)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:model: [通用选项] 模型 Id | (type: string) | required
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:devic: [通用选项] 设备 | (type: string) | default: TEST_DEVICE
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:num_d: [通用选项] 设备数量 | (type: integer) | default: 1
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:reser: [通用选项] 预留内存 Gb | (type: float (0.0–1.0)) | default: 0.0
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:log_l: [通用选项] 日志级别 | (type: string) | default: error
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:input: [通用] 输入长度 | (类型: integer) | 必填
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:outpu: [通用] 输出长度 | (类型: integer) | 必填
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:mtp_a: [通用] Mtp 接受率 | (类型: float (0.0–1.0)) | 默认值: [0.9, 0.6, 0.4, 0.2] | 空格分隔列表 (nargs=+)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:prefi: [通用] 前缀缓存命中率 | (类型: float (0.0–1.0)) | 默认值: 0.0
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:dump_: [通用] 导出原始结果 | (类型: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:compi: [模型与量化选项] 编译 | (类型: string) | 布尔标志
[模型与量化选项] 编译允许图中断 | (类型: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:num_m: [模型与量化选项] Mtp Token 数量 | (类型: integer) | 默认值: 0 | 选项: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4…
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:quant: [模型与量化选项] 量化 Linear 算子 | (类型: string (单选)) | 选项: DISABLED, W8A16_STATIC, W8A8_STATIC, W4A8_STATIC, W8A16_DYNAMIC…
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:mxfp4: [模型与量化选项] Mxfp4 组大小 | (类型: integer) | 默认值: 32
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:quant: [模型与量化选项] 量化 Attention 算子 | (类型: string (单选)) | 选项: DISABLED, INT8, FP8
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:tp_si: [模型与量化选项] Tp Sizes | (类型: integer) | 空格分隔列表 (nargs=*)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:ep_si: [模型与量化选项] Ep Sizes | (类型: integer) | 空格分隔列表 (nargs=*)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:moe_d: [模型与量化选项] Moe Dp Sizes | (类型: integer) | 空格分隔列表 (nargs=*)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:ttft_: [服务选项] Ttft Limits | (类型: float (0.0–1.0))
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:tpot_: [服务选项] Tpot Limits | (类型: float (0.0–1.0))
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:max_p: [服务选项] Max Prefill Tokens | (类型: integer) | 默认值: 8192
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:batch: [服务选项] Batch Range | (类型: integer) | 空格分隔列表 (nargs=+)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:servi: [服务选项] Serving Cost | (类型: float (0.0–1.0)) | 默认值: 0
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:disag: [服务选项] Disagg | (类型: string) | 布尔标志
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:jobs: [服务选项] Jobs | (类型: integer) | 默认值: 8
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:image: [多模态选项] Image Height | (类型: integer)
[多模态选项] Image Width | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:prefi: [PD比率优化选项] Prefill Devices Per Instance | (类型: integer)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:decod: [PD 比率优化选项] 每个实例的解码设备数 | (type: integer)
cli.inference.throughput_optimizer:enabl: [PD 比率优化选项] 启用优化预填充解码比率 | (type: string) | boolean 标志
